<!-- What you have in mind. Rough is fine. -->

- [ ] ...

## Impact

- Users affected: [estimate]
- Frequency of need: [daily / weekly / occasional]
- Workaround exists: [yes / no — what is it]

## Risk and complexity (your gut estimate)

- Risk: [low / medium / high]
- Complexity: [small / medium / large]
- Touches: [auth / billing / personal data / public API / other]

*If this touches auth, billing, or personal data, expect human gates per `constraints.md`.*
